arboviral_diseases_chikungunya_virus_dis.long_name: Cumulative year-to-date cases of Chikungunya virus disease
arboviral_diseases_chikungunya_virus_dis.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date case count of Chikungunya virus disease.
arboviral_diseases_chikungunya_virus_dis.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported cases of Chikungunya virus disease, an arboviral disease transmitted by Aedes mosquitoes, as reported through the National Notifiable Diseases Surveillance System (NNDSS).

arboviral_diseases_eastern_equine_enceph.long_name: Cumulative year-to-date cases of Eastern equine encephalitis virus disease
arboviral_diseases_eastern_equine_enceph.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date case count of Eastern equine encephalitis virus disease.
arboviral_diseases_eastern_equine_enceph.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported cases of Eastern equine encephalitis (EEE) virus disease, a rare but serious arboviral disease transmitted by mosquitoes, as reported through the NNDSS.

arboviral_diseases_jamestown_canyon_viru.long_name: Cumulative year-to-date cases of Jamestown Canyon virus disease
arboviral_diseases_jamestown_canyon_viru.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date case count of Jamestown Canyon virus disease.
arboviral_diseases_jamestown_canyon_viru.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported cases of Jamestown Canyon virus disease, an arboviral disease transmitted by mosquitoes, as reported through the NNDSS.

arboviral_diseases_la_crosse_virus_disea.long_name: Cumulative year-to-date cases of La Crosse virus disease
arboviral_diseases_la_crosse_virus_disea.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date case count of La Crosse virus disease.
arboviral_diseases_la_crosse_virus_disea.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported cases of La Crosse virus disease, an arboviral encephalitis transmitted by the eastern treehole mosquito, as reported through the NNDSS.

arboviral_diseases_powassan_virus_diseas.long_name: Cumulative year-to-date cases of Powassan virus disease
arboviral_diseases_powassan_virus_diseas.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date case count of Powassan virus disease.
arboviral_diseases_powassan_virus_diseas.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported cases of Powassan virus disease, an arboviral disease transmitted by ticks, as reported through the NNDSS.

arboviral_diseases_st_louis_encephalitis.long_name: Cumulative year-to-date cases of St. Louis encephalitis virus disease
arboviral_diseases_st_louis_encephalitis.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date case count of St. Louis encephalitis virus disease.
arboviral_diseases_st_louis_encephalitis.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported cases of St. Louis encephalitis virus disease, an arboviral disease transmitted by Culex mosquitoes, as reported through the NNDSS.

arboviral_diseases_west_nile_virus_disea.long_name: Cumulative year-to-date cases of West Nile virus disease
arboviral_diseases_west_nile_virus_disea.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date case count of West Nile virus disease.
arboviral_diseases_west_nile_virus_disea.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported cases of West Nile virus disease, the most common arboviral disease in the US transmitted by Culex mosquitoes, as reported through the NNDSS.

arboviral_diseases_western_equine_enceph.long_name: Cumulative year-to-date cases of Western equine encephalitis virus disease
arboviral_diseases_western_equine_enceph.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date case count of Western equine encephalitis virus disease.
arboviral_diseases_western_equine_enceph.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported cases of Western equine encephalitis (WEE) virus disease, an arboviral disease transmitted by mosquitoes, as reported through the NNDSS.

babesiosis.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date case count of babesiosis.
babesiosis.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported cases of babesiosis, a tick-borne parasitic disease caused by Babesia species, as reported through the NNDSS.

botulism_foodborne.long_name: Cumulative year-to-date cases of foodborne botulism
botulism_foodborne.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date case count of foodborne botulism.
botulism_foodborne.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported cases of foodborne botulism, caused by ingestion of preformed Clostridium botulinum toxin in contaminated food, as reported through the NNDSS.

botulism_infant.long_name: Cumulative year-to-date cases of infant botulism
botulism_infant.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date case count of infant botulism.
botulism_infant.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported cases of infant botulism, caused by ingestion of Clostridium botulinum spores that colonize the infant intestine and produce toxin, as reported through the NNDSS.

botulism_other_wound_unspecified.long_name: Cumulative year-to-date cases of botulism (other, wound, and unspecified)
botulism_other_wound_unspecified.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date case count of botulism (other, wound, and unspecified types).
botulism_other_wound_unspecified.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported cases of botulism classified as wound botulism, other, or unspecified type, as reported through the NNDSS.

brucellosis.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date case count of brucellosis.
brucellosis.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported cases of brucellosis, a bacterial zoonotic disease caused by Brucella species, as reported through the NNDSS.

campylobacteriosis.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date case count of campylobacteriosis.
campylobacteriosis.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported cases of campylobacteriosis, a bacterial gastrointestinal infection caused by Campylobacter species, as reported through the NNDSS.

candida_auris_clinical.long_name: Cumulative year-to-date reported clinical cases of Candida auris
candida_auris_clinical.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date case count of clinical Candida auris infections.
candida_auris_clinical.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported clinical cases of Candida auris, an emerging multidrug-resistant fungal pathogen, as reported through the NNDSS. Clinical cases involve C. auris isolated from a clinical specimen.

candida_auris_screening.long_name: Cumulative year-to-date reported screening cases of Candida auris
candida_auris_screening.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date count of Candida auris detections from screening.
candida_auris_screening.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of Candida auris detections from colonization screening (non-clinical specimens), as reported through the NNDSS. Screening cases identify asymptomatic colonization.

carbapenemase_producing_carbapenem_resis.long_name: Cumulative year-to-date cases of carbapenemase-producing carbapenem-resistant Enterobacteriaceae
carbapenemase_producing_carbapenem_resis.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date case count of CP-CRE infections.
carbapenemase_producing_carbapenem_resis.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported cases of carbapenemase-producing carbapenem-resistant Enterobacteriaceae (CP-CRE), multidrug-resistant bacterial infections of significant public health concern, as reported through the NNDSS.

carbapenemase_producing_organisms_cpo_to.long_name: Cumulative year-to-date reported total cases of carbapenemase-producing organisms
carbapenemase_producing_organisms_cpo_to.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date total case count of carbapenemase-producing organisms.
carbapenemase_producing_organisms_cpo_to.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date total number of reported cases of carbapenemase-producing organisms (CPO), including all species, as reported through the NNDSS.

chancroid.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date case count of chancroid.
chancroid.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported cases of chancroid, a sexually transmitted infection caused by Haemophilus ducreyi, as reported through the NNDSS.

chlamydia_trachomatis_infection.long_name: Cumulative year-to-date cases of Chlamydia trachomatis infection
chlamydia_trachomatis_infection.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date case count of Chlamydia trachomatis infection.
chlamydia_trachomatis_infection.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported cases of Chlamydia trachomatis infection, the most common nationally notifiable sexually transmitted infection in the US, as reported through the NNDSS.

coccidioidomycosis.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date case count of coccidioidomycosis (Valley fever).
coccidioidomycosis.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported cases of coccidioidomycosis (Valley fever), a fungal infection caused by Coccidioides species endemic to the southwestern US, as reported through the NNDSS.

coccidioidomycosis_confirmed.long_name: Cumulative year-to-date reported confirmed cases of Coccidioidomycosis
coccidioidomycosis_confirmed.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date count of confirmed coccidioidomycosis cases.
coccidioidomycosis_confirmed.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of laboratory-confirmed cases of coccidioidomycosis (Valley fever), as reported through the NNDSS.

coccidioidomycosis_probable.long_name: Cumulative year-to-date reported probable cases of Coccidioidomycosis
coccidioidomycosis_probable.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date count of probable coccidioidomycosis cases.
coccidioidomycosis_probable.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of probable cases of coccidioidomycosis (Valley fever), as reported through the NNDSS.

coccidioidomycosis_total.long_name: Cumulative year-to-date reported total cases of Coccidioidomycosis
coccidioidomycosis_total.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date total case count of coccidioidomycosis.
coccidioidomycosis_total.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date total number of reported cases of coccidioidomycosis (Valley fever), including confirmed and probable, as reported through the NNDSS.

coccidioidomycosis_total_2.long_name: Cumulative year-to-date reported total cases of Coccidioidomycosis (alternate reporting)
coccidioidomycosis_total_2.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date total case count of coccidioidomycosis (alternate column).
coccidioidomycosis_total_2.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date total number of reported cases of coccidioidomycosis (Valley fever) from an alternate reporting period or classification, as reported through the NNDSS.

cryptosporidiosis.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date case count of cryptosporidiosis.
cryptosporidiosis.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported cases of cryptosporidiosis, a parasitic gastrointestinal disease caused by Cryptosporidium, as reported through the NNDSS.

cyclosporiasis.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date case count of cyclosporiasis.
cyclosporiasis.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported cases of cyclosporiasis, an intestinal infection caused by the parasite Cyclospora cayetanensis, as reported through the NNDSS.

dengue_virus_infections_dengue.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date case count of dengue virus infection.
dengue_virus_infections_dengue.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported cases of dengue, a mosquito-borne viral disease caused by dengue virus, as reported through the NNDSS.

dengue_virus_infections_dengue_like_illn.long_name: Cumulative year-to-date cases of dengue-like illness
dengue_virus_infections_dengue_like_illn.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date case count of dengue-like illness.
dengue_virus_infections_dengue_like_illn.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported cases of dengue-like illness, clinical presentations consistent with dengue but not meeting full dengue case criteria, as reported through the NNDSS.

dengue_virus_infections_severe_dengue.long_name: Cumulative year-to-date cases of severe dengue
dengue_virus_infections_severe_dengue.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date case count of severe dengue.
dengue_virus_infections_severe_dengue.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported cases of severe dengue, including dengue hemorrhagic fever and dengue shock syndrome, as reported through the NNDSS.

ehrlichiosis_and_anaplasmosis_ehrlichia_.long_name: Cumulative year-to-date cases of Ehrlichia chaffeensis infection
ehrlichiosis_and_anaplasmosis_ehrlichia_.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date case count of Ehrlichia chaffeensis infection.
ehrlichiosis_and_anaplasmosis_ehrlichia_.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported cases of human monocytic ehrlichiosis caused by Ehrlichia chaffeensis, a tick-borne bacterial disease, as reported through the NNDSS.

ehrlichiosis_and_anaplasmosis_ehrlichia_.long_name: Cumulative year-to-date cases of Ehrlichia ewingii infection
ehrlichiosis_and_anaplasmosis_ehrlichia_.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date case count of Ehrlichia ewingii infection.
ehrlichiosis_and_anaplasmosis_ehrlichia_.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported cases of ehrlichiosis caused by Ehrlichia ewingii, a tick-borne bacterial disease, as reported through the NNDSS.

giardiasis.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date case count of giardiasis.
giardiasis.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported cases of giardiasis, a diarrheal illness caused by the parasite Giardia lamblia, as reported through the NNDSS.

gonorrhea.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date case count of gonorrhea.
gonorrhea.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported cases of gonorrhea, a sexually transmitted infection caused by Neisseria gonorrhoeae, as reported through the NNDSS.

invasive_pneumococcal_disease_all_ages_p.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of probable cases of invasive pneumococcal disease (IPD) across all age groups, as reported through the NNDSS.

legionellosis.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date case count of legionellosis (Legionnaires' disease).
legionellosis.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported cases of legionellosis, including Legionnaires' disease (pneumonia) and Pontiac fever, caused by Legionella bacteria, as reported through the NNDSS.

leptospirosis.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date case count of leptospirosis.
leptospirosis.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported cases of leptospirosis, a bacterial zoonotic disease caused by Leptospira species, as reported through the NNDSS.

leprosy_hansens_disease.long_name: Cumulative year-to-date cases of Leprosy (Hansen's disease)
leprosy_hansens_disease.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date case count of leprosy (Hansen's disease).
leprosy_hansens_disease.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported cases of leprosy (Hansen's disease), a chronic infection caused by Mycobacterium leprae, as reported through the NNDSS. This is an alternate column name for Hansen's disease.

listeriosis_confirmed.long_name: Cumulative year-to-date reported confirmed cases of Listeriosis
listeriosis_confirmed.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date count of confirmed listeriosis cases.
listeriosis_confirmed.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of confirmed cases of listeriosis, a serious foodborne infection caused by Listeria monocytogenes, as reported through the NNDSS.

listeriosis_probable.long_name: Cumulative year-to-date reported probable cases of Listeriosis
listeriosis_probable.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date count of probable listeriosis cases.
listeriosis_probable.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of probable cases of listeriosis, as reported through the NNDSS.

malaria.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date case count of malaria.
malaria.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported cases of malaria, a parasitic disease caused by Plasmodium species transmitted by Anopheles mosquitoes, as reported through the NNDSS.

measles_imported.long_name: Cumulative year-to-date reported imported cases of Measles
measles_imported.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date count of imported measles cases.
measles_imported.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported imported cases of measles (cases with exposure outside the US), as reported through the NNDSS.

measles_indigenous.long_name: Cumulative year-to-date reported indigenous cases of Measles
measles_indigenous.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date count of indigenous (domestically acquired) measles cases.
measles_indigenous.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported indigenous (domestically acquired) cases of measles, as reported through the NNDSS.

melioidosis.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date case count of melioidosis.
melioidosis.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported cases of melioidosis, a serious infection caused by the bacterium Burkholderia pseudomallei found in contaminated water and soil, as reported through the NNDSS.

meningococcal_disease_all_serogroups.long_name: Cumulative year-to-date cases of meningococcal disease, all serogroups
meningococcal_disease_all_serogroups.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date case count of meningococcal disease, all serogroups.
meningococcal_disease_all_serogroups.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported cases of meningococcal disease (all serogroups combined), caused by Neisseria meningitidis, as reported through the NNDSS.

meningococcal_disease_other_serogroups.long_name: Cumulative year-to-date cases of meningococcal disease, other serogroups
meningococcal_disease_other_serogroups.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date case count of meningococcal disease, other serogroups.
meningococcal_disease_other_serogroups.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported cases of meningococcal disease caused by serogroups other than B and ACWY, as reported through the NNDSS.

meningococcal_disease_serogroup_b.long_name: Cumulative year-to-date cases of meningococcal disease, serogroup B
meningococcal_disease_serogroup_b.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date case count of meningococcal disease, serogroup B.
meningococcal_disease_serogroup_b.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported cases of meningococcal disease caused by serogroup B, as reported through the NNDSS.

meningococcal_disease_serogroups_acwy.long_name: Cumulative year-to-date cases of meningococcal disease, serogroups ACWY
meningococcal_disease_serogroups_acwy.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date case count of meningococcal disease, serogroups ACWY.
meningococcal_disease_serogroups_acwy.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported cases of meningococcal disease caused by serogroups A, C, W, or Y, as reported through the NNDSS.

meningococcal_disease_unknown_serogroup.long_name: Cumulative year-to-date cases of meningococcal disease, unknown serogroup
meningococcal_disease_unknown_serogroup.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date case count of meningococcal disease, unknown serogroup.
meningococcal_disease_unknown_serogroup.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported cases of meningococcal disease with unknown serogroup, as reported through the NNDSS.

mpox.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date case count of mpox (formerly monkeypox).
mpox.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported cases of mpox (formerly monkeypox), a viral zoonotic disease caused by monkeypox virus, as reported through the NNDSS.

mumps.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date case count of mumps.
mumps.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported cases of mumps, a viral disease prevented by MMR vaccination, as reported through the NNDSS.

novel_influenza_a_virus_infections.long_name: Cumulative year-to-date cases of novel influenza A virus infections
novel_influenza_a_virus_infections.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date case count of novel influenza A virus infections.
novel_influenza_a_virus_infections.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported human infections with novel influenza A viruses (non-seasonal subtypes such as H5, H7, or variant viruses), as reported through the NNDSS.

pertussis.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date case count of pertussis (whooping cough).
pertussis.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported cases of pertussis (whooping cough), a highly contagious respiratory disease caused by Bordetella pertussis, as reported through the NNDSS.

psittacosis.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date case count of psittacosis.
psittacosis.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported cases of psittacosis, a bacterial respiratory infection caused by Chlamydophila psittaci typically acquired from birds, as reported through the NNDSS.

q_fever_acute.long_name: Cumulative year-to-date cases of acute Q fever
q_fever_acute.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date case count of acute Q fever.
q_fever_acute.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported cases of acute Q fever, caused by Coxiella burnetii typically acquired from livestock, as reported through the NNDSS.

q_fever_chronic.long_name: Cumulative year-to-date cases of chronic Q fever
q_fever_chronic.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date case count of chronic Q fever.
q_fever_chronic.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported cases of chronic Q fever, a serious long-term infection with Coxiella burnetii, as reported through the NNDSS.

q_fever_total.long_name: Cumulative year-to-date reported total cases of Q fever
q_fever_total.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date total case count of Q fever (acute and chronic).
q_fever_total.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date total number of reported cases of Q fever, combining acute and chronic cases, as reported through the NNDSS.

rabies_animal.long_name: Cumulative year-to-date cases of animal Rabies
rabies_animal.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date count of confirmed animal rabies cases.
rabies_animal.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported cases of rabies in animals, as reported through the NNDSS.

rubella.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date case count of rubella (German measles).
rubella.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported cases of rubella (German measles), a viral disease prevented by MMR vaccination, as reported through the NNDSS.

salmonella_typhi_infection.long_name: Cumulative year-to-date cases of Salmonella Typhi infection
salmonella_typhi_infection.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date case count of Salmonella Typhi infection (typhoid fever).
salmonella_typhi_infection.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported cases of Salmonella Typhi infection (typhoid fever), as reported through the NNDSS.

salmonella_paratyphi_infection.long_name: Cumulative year-to-date cases of Salmonella Paratyphi infection
salmonella_paratyphi_infection.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date case count of Salmonella Paratyphi infection.
salmonella_paratyphi_infection.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported cases of Salmonella Paratyphi infection (paratyphoid fever), as reported through the NNDSS.

salmonella_paratyphi_infection_2.long_name: Cumulative year-to-date cases of Salmonella Paratyphi infection (alternate reporting)
salmonella_paratyphi_infection_2.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date case count of Salmonella Paratyphi infection (alternate column).
salmonella_paratyphi_infection_2.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported cases of Salmonella Paratyphi infection from an alternate reporting period or classification, as reported through the NNDSS.

salmonellosis_excluding_salmonella_typhi.long_name: Cumulative year-to-date cases of Salmonellosis (excluding Typhi and Paratyphi)
salmonellosis_excluding_salmonella_typhi.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date case count of non-typhoidal salmonellosis.
salmonellosis_excluding_salmonella_typhi.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported cases of salmonellosis excluding Salmonella Typhi and Salmonella Paratyphi infections, as reported through the NNDSS.

shiga_toxin_producing_escherichia_coli_s.long_name: Cumulative year-to-date cases of Shiga toxin-producing E. coli (STEC)
shiga_toxin_producing_escherichia_coli_s.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date case count of STEC infection.
shiga_toxin_producing_escherichia_coli_s.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported cases of Shiga toxin-producing Escherichia coli (STEC) infection, a cause of bloody diarrhea and hemolytic uremic syndrome, as reported through the NNDSS.

shigellosis.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date case count of shigellosis.
shigellosis.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported cases of shigellosis, a bacterial dysentery caused by Shigella species, as reported through the NNDSS.

streptococcal_toxic_shock_syndrome.long_name: Cumulative year-to-date cases of Streptococcal toxic shock syndrome
streptococcal_toxic_shock_syndrome.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date case count of streptococcal toxic shock syndrome.
streptococcal_toxic_shock_syndrome.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported cases of streptococcal toxic shock syndrome (STSS), a life-threatening condition caused by group A Streptococcus, as reported through the NNDSS.

syphilis_congenital.long_name: Cumulative year-to-date cases of congenital Syphilis
syphilis_congenital.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date case count of congenital syphilis.
syphilis_congenital.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported cases of congenital syphilis (mother-to-child transmission), as reported through the NNDSS.

syphilis_primary_and_secondary.long_name: Cumulative year-to-date cases of primary and secondary Syphilis
syphilis_primary_and_secondary.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date case count of primary and secondary syphilis.
syphilis_primary_and_secondary.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported cases of primary and secondary syphilis, the most infectious stages, as reported through the NNDSS.

tetanus.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date case count of tetanus.
tetanus.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported cases of tetanus, a serious bacterial infection caused by Clostridium tetani, preventable by vaccination, as reported through the NNDSS.

toxic_shock_syndrome_other_than_streptoc.long_name: Cumulative year-to-date cases of toxic shock syndrome (non-streptococcal)
toxic_shock_syndrome_other_than_streptoc.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date case count of non-streptococcal toxic shock syndrome.
toxic_shock_syndrome_other_than_streptoc.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported cases of toxic shock syndrome caused by agents other than group A Streptococcus (typically staphylococcal), as reported through the NNDSS.

trichinellosis.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date case count of trichinellosis.
trichinellosis.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported cases of trichinellosis (trichinosis), a parasitic disease caused by Trichinella roundworms from undercooked meat, as reported through the NNDSS.

tuberculosis.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date case count of tuberculosis.
tuberculosis.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported cases of tuberculosis (TB), a bacterial infection caused by Mycobacterium tuberculosis, as reported through the NNDSS.

tularemia.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date case count of tularemia.
tularemia.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported cases of tularemia, a bacterial disease caused by Francisella tularensis transmitted by ticks or contact with infected animals, as reported through the NNDSS.

vancomycin_intermediate_staphylococcus_a.long_name: Cumulative year-to-date cases of vancomycin-intermediate Staphylococcus aureus
vancomycin_intermediate_staphylococcus_a.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date case count of VISA infections.
vancomycin_intermediate_staphylococcus_a.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported cases of vancomycin-intermediate Staphylococcus aureus (VISA), an antimicrobial-resistant infection of public health concern, as reported through the NNDSS.

vancomycin_resistant_staphylococcus_aure.long_name: Cumulative year-to-date cases of vancomycin-resistant Staphylococcus aureus
vancomycin_resistant_staphylococcus_aure.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date case count of VRSA infections.
vancomycin_resistant_staphylococcus_aure.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported cases of vancomycin-resistant Staphylococcus aureus (VRSA), a rare but serious antimicrobial-resistant infection, as reported through the NNDSS.

varicella_morbidity.long_name: Cumulative year-to-date cases of Varicella morbidity
varicella_morbidity.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date case count of varicella (chickenpox) morbidity.
varicella_morbidity.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported cases of varicella (chickenpox) morbidity, caused by varicella-zoster virus and preventable by vaccination, as reported through the NNDSS.

varicella_disease.long_name: Cumulative year-to-date cases of Varicella disease
varicella_disease.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date case count of varicella (chickenpox) disease.
varicella_disease.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported cases of varicella (chickenpox) disease, as reported through the NNDSS.

vibriosis_any_species_of_the_family_vibr.long_name: Cumulative year-to-date reported confirmed cases of Vibriosis
vibriosis_any_species_of_the_family_vibr.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date count of confirmed vibriosis cases (non-cholera Vibrio species).
vibriosis_any_species_of_the_family_vibr.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of confirmed cases of vibriosis caused by any species of the family Vibrionaceae other than toxigenic Vibrio cholerae O1 or O139, as reported through the NNDSS.

vibriosis_any_species_of_the_family_vibr.long_name: Cumulative year-to-date reported probable cases of Vibriosis
vibriosis_any_species_of_the_family_vibr.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date count of probable vibriosis cases (non-cholera Vibrio species).
vibriosis_any_species_of_the_family_vibr.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of probable cases of vibriosis caused by any species of the family Vibrionaceae other than toxigenic Vibrio cholerae O1 or O139, as reported through the NNDSS.

zika_virus_disease_non_congenital.long_name: Cumulative year-to-date cases of non-congenital Zika virus disease
zika_virus_disease_non_congenital.short_description: Cumulative year-to-date case count of non-congenital Zika virus disease.
zika_virus_disease_non_congenital.long_description: Cumulative year-to-date number of reported cases of non-congenital Zika virus disease, a mosquito-borne flavivirus infection, as reported through the NNDSS.

nnds.name: National Notifiable Diseases Surveillance System (NNDSS)
nnds.organization: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
nnds.description: The National Notifiable Diseases Surveillance System (NNDSS) is a nationwide collaboration that enables all levels of public health to share notifiable disease related health information. Public health uses this information to monitor, control, and prevent the occurrence and spread of state-reportable and nationally notifiable infectious and some non-infectious diseases and conditions.
nnds.restrictions: Public domain. CDC data is generally not subject to copyright restrictions.
